titleStmt.title: SII 38.151: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 151. (A.R. No. 151 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the fourteenth pillar of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Tiṅgaḷēr taru-taṉ, which is however damaged.

It records that an official (meyppēṟṟu sāmanta) of perundaṉam of the king, Aṅgi Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻaṉ alias Ādichchachōḻa-mārāyaṉ had deposited five kāśu each with the paṭṭṇam of Rājarāja-ppāgil at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr and the paṭṭiṇavar of Maṇikkaṅgaippāgil. Both the bodies had agreed to remit interest at 4(1/4) kāśu annually (2(1/8) kāśu by each) at the temple treasury for providing for the bath of the god, for flowers to adorn him, a bundle of grass for the cow at the early morning service and also for conducting other services to the god at the temple.
At the request of both the bodies the temple official Nūṟṟeṇmaṉ Oruppaṉaiyaṉ, the accountant (karaṇattān) of the temple wrote the deed. Other revenue officials also figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
An=tiṇar mutalinar Araicariṭu tiraikaḷum Āṟiloṉṟa vani[yiṟ kūṟu poruḷkaḷum U
kantu nāṉ maṟaiyavar muka[ ntu] koḷak kuṭuttu viśvalokattu viḷaṅku manuneṟi niṉṟa
śvamekañ ceytaraicu viṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉ[ ṉuyarn=ta] perumpukaḻ kovirāja
kecarippanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājādhirājatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 2vatu coḻamaṇṭa
lattuk kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻapurattu Uṭaiyār Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājatevar peruntaṉat
tu meyppeṟṟuc cāman=taril Aṅki jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻanāṉa Āticcacoḻa
mārāyaṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkkuc ciṟukālait tirumañcaṇamāṭiyiruḷiRead tirumañcaṇamāṭiyaruḷa
Oppittaruḷit tiraiyiḻiya Iṭṭālc cāttiyaruḷa Aṅku ntūṇippūvum pacuvukku
vāyuṟai Oru kaṟṟai pullu maṟṟavarkku Āṭṭaiviṭṭam kācu Oṉṟum Atteca kā
lattil Uṭaiyarkku Amurtu ceytaruḷa Aṭaikkāy Aympatu veṟuṅkāy pattu
kkum Ilai Amurtu nāṟpatukku cottirañ colluvār Uṭ(pa)paṭa pirāhmaṇar Ai
yvarkku A mukattile niṉṟiṭa veṟuṅkāy pattum veṟṟilai nāppatukkum
Uṭaiyārkkum pirāhmaṇarkkum can=taṉattukkum Atteca kālattil Iṭavum kaācu
muṉṟey kālumākak kācu nāleykālukkum veccakācu pattum Ikkācu pa
ttilum tiruvoṟṟiyūr rājaraājappākil paṭṭaṇavarom koṇṭa kācu Aiñcuk
ku Āṭṭai viṭṭam Iṭakaṭava palicaik kācu Iraṇṭe Araikkālum maṇikkaṅkai
ppākil paṭṭaṇavarom koṇṭa kācu Aiñcukkum Āṭṭai viṭṭam Iṭakkaṭava pali
caikkācu Iraṇṭe Araikkālum Āka koṇṭa kācu pattukku Iṭakkaṭava kācu ṉā
le kāl Ikkācu nāle kālum Āśantrātitta kālamu Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum tevarpaṇ
ṭārattu vaippomānom Ivviraṇṭu pākil paṭṭaṇavaromum Ivarkaḷ veṇ
ṭaveḻutineṉ Ittevar karaṇattāṉ nūṟṟeṇmaṉ Oruppaṉaiyaneṉ I
vaiy Eṉ Eḻuttu pattakaḷ pāta caraṇaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ jaḷa
dupaṇṭitaneṉ puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷattār kaṇakku ṅ kiḻāṉ kāṭan
kaṇṇan Eḻuttu puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakan kaṇakku puraṅ kiḻavaṉ tiruveḷḷi Eḻuttu nāṭṭu mu
ventaveḷāneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.151 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
